chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-197 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A No.659/26. For orders on office objections. For orders on M.A No.660/26. For hearing of main case. 18.03.2026. Mr. Fakhuruddin Khoso, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ***************************************** 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Petitioners (Mst. Muneeba and Sajid) are present alongwith their counsel. The Petitioners submit that they have contracted marriage on account of their free will and wish without any pressure or coercion and they intend to live together. The Petitioner No.1 apprehends danger to her life at the hands of her parents. Learned counsel, therefore, seeks protection to the Petitioners. Learned A.A.G. Sindh after waiving notice of this petition, states that no harassment would be caused to the petitioners and the police officials shall act strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of along with listed application(s) with direction to the police officials to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners. Let a copy of this order be communicated to Respondent No.2&3 / SSP, Sanghar and Hyderabad for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
